tickets.subject: Incorrect charge on my account
tickets.body: Hi, I noticed I was charged $49.99 on March 15th but my plan is $29.99/month. I have not upgraded anything. Please investigate and issue a correction immediately.

tickets.subject: Need invoice for last 3 months
tickets.body: Hello, I am preparing our quarterly expense report and need PDF invoices for January, February, and March. Could you send them to finance@acmecorp.com?

tickets.subject: Upgrade to annual plan billing question
tickets.body: I would like to switch from monthly $29.99 to annual billing. Will I be charged a prorated amount for the remaining days of this month?

tickets.subject: Wrong plan shown after upgrade
tickets.body: I upgraded from Basic to Pro yesterday but my dashboard still shows Basic features. The payment went through, I have the receipt.

tickets.subject: Request for custom enterprise pricing
tickets.body: We have 500 plus users and are evaluating your Enterprise plan. Can someone from sales contact me to discuss volume pricing?

tickets.subject: Cannot log in 500 error
tickets.body: Every time I try to log in I get a 500 Internal Server Error. This started about an hour ago. I have cleared my cache and tried a different browser. My account is alice@startup.io.

tickets.subject: API rate limit 429 errors
tickets.body: Our integration has been hitting 429 Too Many Requests since yesterday. We send about 800 requests per minute but our plan allows 1000 per minute. This is blocking production.

tickets.subject: CSV export is missing some columns
tickets.body: When I export my data to CSV the columns created_at and tags are missing from the file. This has been happening since last Tuesday.

tickets.subject: Suspected security breach unauthorized logins
tickets.body: I received email alerts for 3 logins from IP 203.0.113.42 in Brazil that were NOT me. I am in Germany and my account has sensitive data. Please lock my account immediately and investigate.

tickets.subject: How to integrate with Zapier
tickets.body: I am trying to set up a Zap that triggers when a new record is created in your system. I have followed the docs but the trigger does not fire. Any step by step guidance?

tickets.subject: Account locked after too many failed logins
tickets.body: I forgot my password and now my account is locked after 5 attempts. How do I unlock it? I have already tried the forgot password link.

tickets.subject: Bulk import failing with parse error
tickets.body: I am trying to import 5000 records via your CSV bulk import tool and getting Parse error on row 1423. The CSV was exported from Salesforce. This is urgent, migration deadline is tomorrow.

tickets.subject: Integration with Slack not working
tickets.body: Our Slack notifications stopped working 2 days ago. I have re-authenticated the integration but still no messages are sent. Workspace is acme-team.slack.com

tickets.subject: Service completely down revenue impact
tickets.body: URGENT. All our users are unable to access the platform. We have been down for 45 minutes. This is causing direct revenue loss estimated at 10000 dollars per hour. Need immediate escalation to engineering.

tickets.subject: Requesting full refund unused subscription
tickets.body: I signed up by mistake last week and have not used the service at all. I would like a full refund of 149.99 dollars under your 30 day money back guarantee.

tickets.subject: Partial refund for downtime
tickets.body: Your system was down for 6 hours on March 10th incident INC-2203. Per your SLA we are entitled to a service credit. Please apply this to our next invoice.

tickets.subject: Duplicate charges please refund one
tickets.body: I was charged twice in March, once on the 1st and again on the 3rd, both for 29.99 dollars. Only one should have gone through. Transactions TXN-9912 and TXN-9945.

tickets.subject: Absolutely unacceptable service escalation required
tickets.body: This is the THIRD time I am writing about the same issue and nobody has resolved it. My data has been corrupted for 2 weeks, your support keeps closing tickets without fixing anything. I am considering legal action.

tickets.subject: Misleading pricing on your website
tickets.body: Your homepage says starting at 9 dollars per month but when I checked out the actual minimum was 29 dollars per month. This is false advertising.

tickets.subject: Support agent was rude
tickets.body: The agent I spoke with on ticket 4521 was dismissive and cut me off multiple times. I have been a customer for 3 years and I expect better.

tickets.subject: How do I add team members
tickets.body: We are growing and I want to invite 5 colleagues to our workspace. Where do I find the team management settings?

tickets.subject: What are your data retention policies
tickets.body: We are doing a GDPR compliance audit. Could you share your data retention policy and DPA Data Processing Agreement?

tickets.subject: Cancel my subscription
tickets.body: Please cancel my subscription effective end of this billing period. I am switching to a competitor. No need to try to retain me.

tickets.subject: Feature request dark mode
tickets.body: Any plans for dark mode in the dashboard? It would really help with eye strain during long sessions.

tickets.subject: How to export data before cancelling
tickets.body: I am planning to cancel next week. How do I export all my data? I want to make sure I do not lose anything.
